data.content:
The build confirms the issue. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file successfully, but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit globbing evaluates at project load time — before the target runs — so the generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `<Compile>` (and `<FileWrites>` for clean support) inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file correctly (we can see "Generated code file: obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs" in the output), but the generated file is not being added to the `Compile` item group.

In MSBuild, glob patterns for `Compile` items are evaluated during project evaluation (before targets run). Since the file doesn't exist at evaluation time, it's not automatically picked up by the implicit glob.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, after it's generated. Also, good practice is to add it to `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned up properly.


Now I need to update the target to explicitly add the generated file to the Compile items after creation.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` to `obj/`, but never tells MSBuild to compile it. SDK-style implicit globbing (`**/*.cs`) is evaluated at project load — before any targets execute — so the file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added `<Compile Include="..."/>` and `<FileWrites Include="..."/>` inside the target's `<ItemGroup>` so the generated file is included in compilation and properly cleaned.
